projectsSection.heading: Selected Work
projectsSection.subHeading: A deep dive into strategies, execution, and real-world impact.

projects.title: Aryu Academy
projects.tagline: Growing a coding academy from 0 to 90,000 followers through audience-first content strategy.
description: Aryu Academy is a coding and career-focused learning platform for students in India.

Before creating content, I focused on understanding the audience. Through research and observation, I identified a common challenge among students: uncertainty about career choices, future opportunities, and the skills needed to secure good jobs.

Based on these insights, I helped shape the content direction around career guidance, clarity, and value-driven education. Every piece of content was designed to address real student concerns rather than simply promote courses.
My role included content strategy, reel scripting, content planning, and creative direction.
results: Grew the Instagram page from 1,500 → 16,000 followers organically in 6 months
Created story-driven content focused on local audience engagement
Strengthened brand awareness and recall among the target audience
Led content strategy, scripting, shoot execution, and creative planning

projects.title: South Indian Coffee House
projects.tagline: Building a stronger local brand presence through culture-driven content.
description: The goal wasn't just to grow followers. The brand wanted to become more recognizable and memorable among people in Coimbatore while strengthening its presence on Instagram.
Instead of creating generic food content, I focused on understanding the local audience and how they emotionally connect with coffee culture.
The content strategy was built around familiar situations, relatable storytelling, and the idea that coffee naturally reminds people of South Indian Coffee House.
I was involved in content strategy, script writing, shoot execution, and creative direction, ensuring every piece of content aligned with the brand's identity and audience behavior.
results: Grew the Instagram page from 1,500 → 16,000 followers organically in 6 months
Created story-driven content focused on local audience engagement
Strengthened brand awareness and recall among the target audience
Led content strategy, scripting, shoot execution, and creative planning

projects.title: daWg (Zebronics)
projects.tagline: Creating content for a gaming audience, not just promoting products.
description: DaWg, a gaming brand from Zebronics, wanted to strengthen its presence among Indian gamers and increase product visibility through content.
Rather than creating typical product-focused posts, I worked on content concepts designed around gaming culture, audience interests, and platform behavior.

My role involved content strategy, creative ideation, scripting, and collaborating with designers, 3D artists, videographers, and editors to produce high-quality content that felt relevant to the gaming community.
The content was further amplified through Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns to expand reach and support product awareness.
results: Grew the Instagram page from 35K → 45K followers
Developed content concepts tailored specifically for gaming audiences
Collaborated with designers, 3D artists, videographers, and editors
Supported product visibility through targeted Meta & Google Ads campaigns

projects.title: Kadai2Manai
projects.tagline: Defining how a brand should think, communicate, and position itself.
description: Unlike my other projects, this engagement focused entirely on brand strategy.

I worked closely with the team to define the brand's positioning, messaging, audience understanding, and communication direction. The result was a detailed strategy framework designed to create consistency across future marketing and brand-building efforts.
results: Developed a comprehensive brand strategy document

zigZagSection.heading: Creative Work
zigZagSection.subHeading: A look at some of the key content pieces I've directed.

items.description: Recently we shot the product advertising for a client who wanted to showcase their items in high quality on their shop’s TV screens. Our team focused on artistic macro shots to bring the product’s natural essence to life, ensuring a polished and professional look that commands attention in any retail space.

items.title: Behind the Scenes: Aryu Academy
items.description: This BTS shows my role in directing for Aryu Academy. My process goes far beyond just shooting. I take ownership from crafting the script and directing the shoot to guiding the edit, ensuring every detail reflects the brand's vision. This hands-on approach delivers high-quality results, leading to exceptional engagement and reach on Instagram.

experience.title: On Time Delivery
experience.content: I plan every project with clear timelines, realistic milestones, and structured workflows. From concept to execution, I ensure deliverables are completed on schedule without compromising creative quality. Consistency and reliability are core to how I work.

education.title: Strategic Thinking
education.content: I approach every campaign and piece of content with a strategic lens—understanding the brand objective, audience psychology, and long-term impact. Every creative decision is backed by intent, insight, and measurable purpose.

skills.title: Clean Communication
skills.content: I believe strong ideas deserve clear communication. I maintain transparent discussions with clients and teams, translate complex ideas into simple narratives, and ensure alignment at every stage of execution.

awards.title: Creative Execution
awards.content: From scripting reels to building brand narratives, I transform ideas into compelling visual and written content. My execution balances creativity with structure, ensuring every output serves both emotion and strategy.

Quality.title: Quality First
Quality.content: Quality is never an afterthought. I focus on detail, consistency, and refinement across all deliverables—because strong brands are built not on volume, but on thoughtful, well-crafted work.

steps.title: 1. Understand the Audience
steps.description: Every strategy starts with understanding what people care about.

steps.title: 2. Find the Core Problem
steps.description: The best content solves a problem, answers a question, or creates an emotion.

steps.title: 3. Build the Content Direction
steps.description: I focus on creating content systems, not random posts.

steps.title: 4. Execute & Improve
steps.description: Content is refined through performance, feedback, and consistency.

items.quote: This is exactly what our audience needed
